title: Sales Manager Vacancy at ATS Infrastructure - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at ATS Infrastructure - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
